final_yaml:
service: DTrain Controller
service_key: dtrain-controller
container_name: node-1-dtrain-controller
image: platformops/dtrain-controller:local
environment: {}
ports:
- 8102:8080
volumes:
- /tmp/platformops/dtrain/controller/logs:/app/logs
- /tmp/platformops/dtrain/controller/config:/app/config
- /tmp/platformops/dtrain/artifacts:/app/artifacts
healthcheck: {}
